name: structurefirst
description: Autonomous emergency structure intelligence for pre-arrival tactical briefing.

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @structurefirst/contracts && concurrently -k -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @structurefirst/server" "npm run dev -w @structurefirst/web"
scripts.dev:full: npm run build -w @structurefirst/contracts && concurrently -k -n worker,server,web -c magenta,blue,green "npm run worker" "npm run dev -w @structurefirst/server" "npm run dev -w @structurefirst/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @structurefirst/contracts && npm run build -w @structurefirst/server && npm run build -w @structurefirst/web
scripts.check: npm run check -w @structurefirst/contracts && npm run check -w @structurefirst/server && npm run check -w @structurefirst/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @structurefirst/server && npm run test -w @structurefirst/web
